content.en:
Taiwu tribe.

Dozens of people at the level of reinforcements gathered here, looking at the fog with envy in their eyes.

They also want to become a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, and they are also constantly working hard, but they didn't expect it to be Wuwu who broke through first.

In terms of strength, the previous Fog Crow was not the first level of the Primordial Ancient Sea, but now there is no dispute, the Fog Crow is already a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, and it is naturally the most powerful to the level of the Enhanced Matter.

Seeing that the major tribes were almost at the fortified level, Wu Wu said, "Everyone, I have now broken through to the mid-level immeasurable lifeform level, and it is time for us to invade the Silent Black Sea." Otherwise, when the Silent Black Sea also gives birth to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, then we won't be able to help them!"

"Yes, this is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity! The territory of the Silent Black Sea is vast, although the resources are not abundant, but there are many good places, if it is captured, the entire Silent Black Sea will also belong to the major tribes of our Primordial Ancient Sea!

"Then it's decided, you gather all the people and the primordial antiquities under your command, and I will open the passage, and everyone will invade the Silent Black Sea together. "

Wuwu said.

......

Nine-story building.

One by one, the Supreme Nine Ancestors were out of the customs because they had received news that the Primordial Ancient Sea had given birth to a Supreme Strengthening Rank and was about to invade the Silent Black Sea.

In such a situation, where do they still have the heart to retreat!

And even the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestors are out of the customs.

"Jiuxuan Dao Ancestor, that guy in Wuwu has broken through to the realm of a mid-level immeasurable life body, and his strength has increased too much, what should I do now?" Dongchen Dao Ancestor frowned.

Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor sighed: "Although I have recovered from my injuries, I also have the hope of breaking through to the realm of middle-level immeasurable life forms, but time is too late, if I am given hundreds of billions of Origin Domain Era years, I am seventy percent sure of breaking through, but it is impossible for the Primordial Ancient Sea to give us such a long time now!"

"I can only unite with the Supreme Nine Ancestors of other forces, and if we join forces, we may be able to fight against the Fog Wu!" Beiyu Daozu said.

Swinging Sea Dao Ancestor shook his head, "It's useless, even if you join forces, if you want to deal with the Fog Wu, you need seven or eight primary-level immeasurable lifeforms of the level of the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor to unite together, so that you can barely compete with one or two, but it won't last long." But even if we drag down the fog black, how can we compete with the other enhancement levels?"

"If you don't jointly cut off those supreme reinforcements in the forbidden area, maybe there is a little hope that you can bear it!"

Mountain Wind Daozu proposed.

"It's only like this, you have to be fast, you have to immediately go to the soul elder who cut off the forbidden area to discuss!"

Jiuxuan Dao Ancestor said.

Immediately, Dongchen Daozu personally went to the forbidden area to contact the soul elder and others to strengthen the matter level.

Soon, the supreme reinforcements who cut off the forbidden area were aware, but they had different opinions.

So, they began to argue.

Some of the supreme strengtheners led by Akagi did not agree with the truncation forbidden area and those supreme ninefold ancestors to join forces with the antigen primordial ancient sea, and chose to stay on the sidelines.

However, the Soul Elder was in favor of uniting, after all, once the Silent Black Sea was defeated, they would likely be invaded.

"Soul Elder, we occupy a natural treasure like the Forbidden Zone, if we are trapped here, the mid-level immeasurable lifeforms will not be able to help us. When a mid-level immeasurable lifeform is born among us, there is no need to be afraid of that guy in the fog, there is no need to take risks. Now, if you go out to fight the Primordial Ancient Sea, how many deaths will you have to reach the Reinforcement level?"

"That's it, Soul Elder, we are also taking the path of the highest level of strengthening, the same path as the Primordial Ancient Sea, but it is different from the Silent Black Sea Road, even if we want to help, we have to help the Primordial Ancient Sea, why help the Silent Black Sea?"

After some discussion, most of the Forbidden Zone to the Reinforcement Level did not agree to aid those Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Silent Black Sea.

Seeing this, the soul elder also chose to give up.

After all, if the other supreme enhancement level is unwilling to go, he will be in danger with a few supreme reinforcement level, and it is likely that all of them will die.

In that case, it would be better to be trapped and cut off the forbidden area!

In this way, the cut off of the exclusion zone refused to aid the Silent Black Sea.

......

Dongchen Daozu came back and informed Jiuxuan Daozu of their attitude towards cutting off the forbidden area.

"They don't want to help!"

Dongchen Dao Ancestral Road.

"It's too selfish to cut off the exclusion zone!"

Jiuxuan Dao Ancestor was furious.

But if you don't help by cutting off the forbidden area, they can't force them, otherwise there will be one more enemy!

Subsequently, the Supreme Ninefold Primordial Ancestors of the Ten Dao Mountains, the Demon Sea, the Mysterious Realm, and the Divine Blood Sect also contacted the Ninefold Building, and everyone could only join forces, and then gather countless Dao Ancestors to prepare for the battle.

There is no other way.

Truncate the Xuanlou.

"The Primordial Ancient Sea is going to invade the Silent Black Sea, they are going to die!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The other Supreme Nine Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building were flustered, but he was very calm.

Even if Wu Wu breaks through to become a middle-level immeasurable lifeform, it is estimated that even the realm is not stable, and such a middle-level immeasurable lifeform is not powerful.

And according to the information he knew, the Fog Crow was not powerful before the breakthrough, so he was just an ordinary mid-level immeasurable lifeform.

According to the attack standard, Wuwu's current attack power has reached seven or eight hundred immeasurable scales at most, and his current immeasurable scale has reached a level close to three thousand immeasurable scales.

The difference between the seven or eight hundred immeasurable scale and the three thousand immeasurable scale is very huge, and he is enough to crush the fog black.

So, he didn't panic at all.

Of course.

He didn't show his strength either, and when the Primordial Ancient Sea invaded, he would strike again, which would be enough to severely damage the Primordial Ancient Sea, or even destroy the Primordial Ancient Sea.

......

Time passed slowly, and the invading army of the primordial ancient sea was assembled.

this day.

Silent Black Sea, boundless region.

Bang!!!!

The void cracked, and ancient nests emerged.

In an instant, with these ancient nests as the foundation, one by one the space-time passages were opened.

Airplanes!!!!

Countless primordial artifacts poured into the Boundless Boundary, covering the entire Boundless Realm in an instant.

It is conceivable how many original antiquities came this time.

And among them, the primordial artifacts comparable to the sevenfold and eightfold ancestors seem to be endless, and there are too many of them.

In such a war, Yae Harazu was just cannon fodder.

For a moment, those Dao Ancestors in the Boundless Region Realm were terrified and showed despair, this was not a situation they could deal with at all!

Boom Boom Boom !!

A terrifying figure descended, and these were all at the level of a powerful object.
